õĖŗõĖĆµŁźõ╝śÕģłń║¦’╝Üõ╗ź fresh-dispatch µ¢╣Õ╝Åń╗¦ń╗Ł `B_PAYMENT_ENGINE_OFFICIAL_BREADTH` / P0-005 ńÜäõĖŗõĖĆµ×ÜÕģĘõĮō verifier µł¢ implementation Õłćńēć’╝īķÜÅÕÉÄµöČÕÅŻ P1 LayerEngine/Õģ©ÕŹĪĶ»üµŹ«’╝ø4D-02 õ╗ģõĮ£õĖ║ spell duel / battle task-scoped regression foundation’╝īõĖŹńŁēÕÉīÕ«īµĢ┤Õ«śµ¢╣ battle lifecycleŃĆé
2026-05-24 4D-17EP P1-004 recovery/replay determinism note’╝ÜA_MAIN tightened `MatchRecoveryValidator.ValidateAuthoritativeState` so authoritative battlefield-resolution nullable source metadata rejects malformed present values. Malformed final authoritative battlefield-resolution metadata now fails base recovery-frame validation before restore, spectator comparison, or action-log replay consumes blank or whitespace-mutated `SourceObjectId` values, while preserving `null` as the existing absence shape. Existing `MatchRecoveryTests` coverage now proves battlefield-resolution source metadata drift diagnostics. Runtime changed: yes, recovery frame validation only; command resolution/protocol/frontend/matrix/fullOfficial unchanged. Validation passed: focused `166/166`; adjacent recovery/opening/store-smoke `747/747`; backend full `6112/6112`. This narrows P1-004 replay/recovery determinism but does not close broader command/recovery/random determinism, full LayerEngine breadth, P0/P1, frontend build, Chrome smoke, formal E2E or READY. Project remains **NOT READY**.
2026-05-24 4D-17EQ P1-004 recovery/replay determinism note’╝ÜA_MAIN tightened `MatchRecoveryValidator.ValidateAuthoritativeState` so authoritative battlefield/battle resolution object-list metadata rejects malformed entries. Malformed final authoritative resolution-history metadata now fails base recovery-frame validation before restore, spectator comparison, or action-log replay consumes blank, whitespace-mutated or duplicate participant/attacker/defender/survivor/destroyed object-list entries. Existing `MatchRecoveryTests` coverage now proves resolution object-list metadata drift diagnostics. Runtime changed: yes, recovery frame validation only; command resolution/protocol/frontend/matrix/fullOfficial unchanged. Validation passed: focused `166/166`; adjacent recovery/opening/store-smoke `747/747`; backend full `6112/6112`.
